snowflake.label: Snowflake focus
snowflake.plan_line: Snowflake for live metrics and warehouse-backed evidence.
snowflake.base_notes: Query live metrics via the Snowflake MCP server. Prefer curated marts and semantic views when they cover the question; else query staging tables. Verify objects live (SHOW TABLES / DESCRIBE / SHOW SEMANTIC VIEWS) before querying. Read-only — the server's SQL statement allowlist permits SELECT/DESCRIBE/SHOW/USE only, never ALTER/DELETE/DROP. The semantic-view write tool is disabled in config for read-only safety; query semantic views with SELECT via run_snowflake_query.
